stories.title: WWE Night of Champions: Live results and analysis
stories.summary: Which WWE superstars will earn the right for the next shot at men's and women's singles championships?

stories.title: Aiyuk blames ex-agent for causing 49ers issues
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.

stories.title: Penguins put family first, draft both Ruck twins
stories.summary: Marcus and Liam Ruck, twins from Osoyoos, British Columbia who spent the past two-plus seasons as one of the Western Hockey League's most productive tandems in Medicine Hat, were selected by the Pittsburgh Penguins at the NHL draft in Buffalo, New York.

stories.title: Venus 'can't wait' to play doubles with Serena
stories.summary: Venus Williams "can't wait" to team up with little sister Serena in doubles at Wimbledon, a tournament they have won six times together.

stories.title: Uruguay out of WC after GK blunder against Spain
stories.summary: Uruguay pulled goalkeeper Fernando Muslera at halftime of their FIFA World Cup group stage final after his blunder in the first half gifted Spain the lead at Estadio Akron on Friday.
